div1.entryFree:
Bloodless, 1) void of blood, pale: b. fear, Ven. 891. at last he takes her by the b. hand, Lucr. 1597. in b. white and the encrimsoned mood, Compl. 201. meagre, pale and b. H6B III, 2, 162. thou b. remnant of that royal blood, R3 I, 2, 7. pale and b. emulation, Troil. I, 3, 134. struck pale and b. Tit. III, 1, 258.
2) without shedding blood: with b. stroke my heart doth gore, Tw. II, 5, 117.
